objective: Objectif de stratégie crypto: Sur le marché RUNEUSDC dans le timeframe 1h, utiliser les indicateurs suivants : [ind1], [ind2] et [ind3]. Faire usage d'entrées telles que [conditions 1], [conditions 2], [conditions 3], tout en imposant des sorties [sortie 1], [sortie 2], [sortie 3]. Assurez-vous de mettre en place un management du risque avec une stop loss à {SL} et une tp atteinte à {TP}.

iterations.hypothesis: Combining Bollinger bands and ATR with RSI can help identify potential trends in the RUNE-USDC market, filtering out range bound periods by using both upper and lower Bollinger band breakout conditions. Additionally, we use ADX as a trend strength filter.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] The strategy uses Bollinger bands, ATR and RSI indicators to identify potential trends in the RUNE-USDC market. The entry long condition is based on close prices being above Bollinger's upper band and RSI values greater than 50 with a positive ADX value. Exit conditions are when close price crosses below the middle Bollinger band or an ADX falls below 20. If results are poor, changes could include adjusting stop loss and take profit levels, as well as tweaking exit conditions to better capture profitable trends. A backup plan might involve using different indicators or combining them in a different way.
[Backup plan] 1. Adjusting the entry long condition by changing the RSI value threshold for entering trades from 50 to another value (e.g., 60). This could help filter out false signals and potentially increase profitability. 2. Trying other combinations of indicators, such as adding a moving average or adjusting the parameters of Bollinger bands. 3. Using different market conditions to enter trades by incorporating additional filters like volume or candlestick patterns.
